summary: Completed testing of Marketplace Overhaul features. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94%). Admin Marketplace page working correctly with all new fields. User Marketplace: Current route uses MarketplaceEnhanced.js instead of the new SBI Rewardz-style Marketplace.js - ROUTE CONFIGURATION ISSUE.

minor.issue: 404 - Endpoint doesn't exist. Backend has /api/cart/add (POST with user_id in body) or /api/v2/cart/{uid}/add. Frontend Marketplace.js uses wrong endpoint pattern.

integration_issues.issue: Route /marketplace uses MarketplaceEnhanced.js instead of new Marketplace.js with SBI Rewardz-style design
integration_issues.fix_required: Change App.js line 216 from MarketplaceEnhanced to Marketplace component

action_items: CRITICAL: Update App.js route to use new Marketplace.js instead of MarketplaceEnhanced.js for /marketplace route
Fix cart API endpoint mismatch in Marketplace.js - use /api/cart/add or /api/v2/cart/{uid}/add instead of /api/cart/{uid}/add
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 216: Route /marketplace incorrectly uses MarketplaceEnhanced instead of new Marketplace component with SBI Rewardz-style design
Marketplace.js cart endpoints don't match backend - uses /api/cart/{uid}/add but backend has /api/cart/add or /api/v2/cart/{uid}/add
Admin Marketplace (AdminMarketplace.js) is correctly implemented with all new fields: badge, show_on_home, stock_quantity, delivery_charge_type, cost_to_company
Backend product CRUD APIs working correctly with multipart form data for image upload

success_rate.frontend: Admin Marketplace: 100%, User Marketplace: Route misconfigured

seed_data_creation: Created test products during backend testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Marketplace at /admin/marketplace is fully functional with all new fields. User Marketplace at /marketplace currently shows MarketplaceEnhanced.js (old design) instead of new Marketplace.js (SBI Rewardz-style). Main agent needs to update App.js route configuration.

Admin Marketplace page loads.details: Page loads with stats cards (Total, Active, In Stock, Out of Stock, On Home, With Badge)

Admin can filter products by category an.details: Category filter (All Categories dropdown) and Status filter (All Status dropdown) present and functional

Admin product form has all new fields.details: Add Product modal contains: Basic Information (name, description, category, badge), Pricing (PRC price, INR price auto-calculated, cost to company), Delivery Settings (type, amount), Stock & Status (quantity, status, product status), Show on Home checkbox, Product Image upload

User marketplace page loads with SBI Rew.details: Route /marketplace uses MarketplaceEnhanced.js instead of new Marketplace.js. SBI Rewardz-style design (blue header, category tabs, Redeem Your Points section) NOT displayed.

Redeem Your Points section displays corr.details: Not visible because wrong component is being used. Marketplace.js has this section but MarketplaceEnhanced.js does not.

Product cards display points, INR price,.details: Current MarketplaceEnhanced shows PRC price, INR price, category badge, stock status. New Marketplace.js has additional badge display and free delivery indicator.

Cart functionality works.details: Cart button visible. Cart API endpoint mismatch - frontend uses /api/cart/{uid}/add but backend has /api/cart/add

Backend API GET /api/products returns pr.details: Returns products array with pagination support
